title: CodeReviewBaseOutput
description: Output contract of the code-review BASE reviewer (Pass-1) in the four-pass code-review gate (epic b744 / WS1). A standalone agent step run with `mode=structured` against THIS schema, so BOTH named outputs survive into the workflow: `findings` (kernel-shaped Pass-1 evidence records — claim/criteria/evidence/impact — flowing into merge -> Pass-2 verify) and `recommend_overlays` (the bounded base->overlay escalation signal flowing into WS3's overlay_union). `overlay_id` is a plain string HERE on purpose: the closed OVERLAY_IDS enum is enforced POST-HOC by `code_review.registry.filter_recommend_overlays` (an out-of-catalog id is DROPPED, not a validation error), and `reason` is truncated to its policy length by that same filter. additionalProperties:true throughout so a slightly-richer agent payload passes (the gate normalizes downstream).

findings.description: Pass-1 evidence findings in the review-kernel shape (claim/criteria/evidence/impact). Permissive items: the kernel + merge step normalize them.

recommend_overlays.description: Bounded base->overlay escalation signal. Each entry names an overlay the base reviewer judges should ALSO run; unknown overlay_ids are dropped post-hoc against the closed OVERLAY_IDS enum.

overlay_id.description: An overlay id; validated post-hoc against the closed OVERLAY_IDS enum (out-of-catalog ids dropped, never errored).

reason.description: One-line justification for escalating to this overlay (truncated to the policy length, ~200 chars, by the filter).
